question.question: If you keep driving that fast, you {a1} a ticket.

source.name: Custom: Will vs Be Going To All Levels (A2)

tag.name: Will vs Be Going To All Levels

variants.text: If you keep driving that fast, you {a1} a ticket.

hints.hint:
Form: **will + base verb**.
In warnings about a likely consequence, this pattern uses **will**.
Example: *If you keep driving that fast, you will get a ticket.*

Forma: **will + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
W ostrzeżeniach o prawdopodobnej konsekwencji w tym modelu używamy **will**.
Przykład: *If you keep driving that fast, you will get a ticket.*

Форма: **will + V1**.
У попередженнях про ймовірний наслідок у цій моделі використовується **will**.
Приклад: *If you keep driving that fast, you will get a ticket.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: If you keep driving that fast, you {a1} a ticket.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
❌ "are going to" does not fit because this is a warning about a likely consequence. In this pattern we choose **will**.
Example: *If you keep driving that fast, you will get a ticket.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: If you keep driving that fast, you {a1} a ticket.
